# Official Site Support Data

## Purpose

Stores Tier 1 data captured under controlled provenance from official HoYoverse sources. This is the highest-tier external data but still requires provenance mapping and human review before supporting any claim.

## Examples of Sources That Belong Here

- HoYoWiki controlled provenance captures (snapshots, not live queries)
- Official news/announcement archives
- Official character profile data (if provenance-captured)

## Allowed Use

- Official-site provenance support (pairing with Tier 0 evidence)
- Source candidate generation
- Official metadata cross-check

## Disallowed Use

- Direct canon proof (without Tier 0 backing + claim mapping + human review)
- source_evidence_id (by itself)
- Raw game text substitution
- Status upgrades without full pipeline

## Note

Not canon by itself unless paired with Tier 0 evidence through full claim mapping pipeline (Tier 0 evidence → claim map → provenance → human review → acceptance). Tier 1 provenance rules apply — controlled capture required, not live API queries.
